auth.login_info: Log in to manage your bulk orders
auth.register_subtitle: Register as a buyer to source directly from farmers
auth.join_subtitle: Create an account to start bulk sourcing

hero.description: Marutham connects wholesale buyers directly with regional farmers. Get premium bulk agro products including Dried Vathal, Grains, and Spices at factory-direct pricing.

benefits.quality_desc: Eliminating middlemen to bring you the freshest produce directly from our network of verified regional farmers.
benefits.pricing_desc: The more you buy, the more you save. We offer structured weight-based discounts for retail and wholesale buyers.
benefits.logistics_desc: Integrated logistics tracking ensuring your heavy shipments reach your warehouse safely and on schedule.

categories.title: Browse by Category
categories.subtitle: Wide selection of bulk agriculture products tailored for retail businesses and processors.

coming_soon.title: Coming Soon
coming_soon.description: We are constantly expanding our network of farmers. Here are some exciting new products launching next month.

cta.title: Ready to scale your business with bulk sourcing?
cta.description: Join 5,000+ businesses across India who trust Marutham for their bulk agricultural needs. Get custom quotes for orders over 1,000kg.

footer.description: Connecting rural farmers directly with businesses. Premium bulk agricultural products delivered across the nation with guaranteed quality.
footer.rights: © 2026 Marutham Agro Pvt Ltd. All rights reserved.

product.alert_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this product?

products.title: Bulk Marketplace
products.subtitle: Find premium agricultural products at direct farmer prices. Filter by category or search for specific items available for bulk purchase.
products.search_placeholder: Search products by name, city, or farmer name...
products.no_results_text: Try adjusting your filters or search term to find what you're looking for.

cart.title: Your Shipment Cart
cart.empty_text: Looks like you haven't added any bulk agricultural products to your shipment yet.
cart.outdated_alert: Your cart contains outdated items from a previous session. We need to clear them to proceed with the new database system. Clear cart and start again?
cart.cleared_msg: Cart cleared. Please add your bulk items from the Marketplace again.

orders.title: My Shipments
orders.subtitle: Track and manage your bulk agricultural orders.
orders.no_orders_text: You haven't placed any bulk orders matching this filter yet.

payment.title: Secure Payment
payment.scan_info: Open GPay, PhonePe, or any UPI app to scan this QR and complete the payment of
payment.guard_text: Your funds are secure. Post payment, please upload the transaction screenshot. Our team verifies payments every 30 minutes between 9 AM - 9 PM IST.
payment.verify_text: Once the payment is successful in your banking app, take a screenshot of the receipt and upload it here for verification.
payment.pending_text: We've received your receipt. Our team is verifying the transaction with the bank.
payment.verified_text: Thank you! Your order has been marked as paid and sent to our fulfillment center.

admin.product_info: Create, edit, and delete products in the inventory.
admin.user_info: View users, promote to admin, and manage user accounts.
